title: phleum boehmeri var. ciliatum
intro: Phleum boehmeri var. ciliatum is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Phleum boehmeri plant, commonly known as a type of grass. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to provide several health benefits, including relief from fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Phleum boehmeri var. ciliatum is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments.
